insights.title: Labor tracked within 5% of budget
insights.finding: Total labor actual $440,393 vs budget $463,275 — -$22,882 variance.

insights.title: Scope stability — 6 executed COs net $23,638 (+0.00% of contract)
insights.finding: Minimal scope churn indicates well-defined contract and experienced GC. Candidate GC profile for future similar bids.

insights.title: Largest variance — cost code 230 (Finish Material) under by $64,358
insights.finding: Budget $336,907, actual $272,549 (-19.1%). Flag for bid calibration.
